\subsection*{Running Results Snapshot}
This fragment is generated directly from \texttt{gpt5\_clean\_quantum\_results.json} and \texttt{gpt5\_clean\_quantum\_fit.json}.

The current finished run contains 3072 usable evaluations. The overall mean normalized error is 0.398, with median 0.278, 90th percentile 1.000, and 95th percentile 1.000. Exact-correct outputs occur on 0.361 of samples, while 0.267 of samples are effectively full-error failures.
The best model by mean error is \texttt{gpt-5.4} (0.329), while the weakest is \texttt{gpt-5.1} (0.501). The best depth setting is 4 with mean error 0.393. The hardest category is \texttt{circuit\_evolution} (0.670), and the easiest is \texttt{entanglement\_classification} (0.099).
The fitted scaling law is $d_{phys} \approx k S^{-0.957} D^{-0.022}$, with $\alpha=0.957 [-0.294, 2.215]$ and $\beta=-0.022 [-0.578, 0.511]$.
